items: Dansby Swanson homered 2 times, driving in 7 as Chicago Cubs beat The Mets, 10-3.
Samuel Basallo homered 2 times, driving in 4 in The Angels's 7-6 win over Baltimore.
Paul Goldschmidt homered 2 times as The Yankees beat Detroit, 4-2.
Dansby Swanson had 7 RBI, with 2 home runs as Chicago Cubs beat The Mets, 10-3.
Cleveland edged Chicago White Sox, 4-3, in 10 innings.
San Francisco walked off The Athletics, 2-1 — one of 2 one-run finishes across the league.
